headings.styling: tracking-tight, never center by default, expressive sizes
headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter text-slate-900
headings.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key highlights. Limit usage to maintain impact.

accent.usage: Secondary CTAs, featured pricing card tags, warning/attention elements.

success.usage: Checkmarks in pricing, success toasts, WhatsApp CTA.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 extensively. Mobile-first grids.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards. Anti-pattern: sharp edges.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-3xl p-6 sm:p-8
surfaces_and_micro_themes.glass_header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_micro_themes.pricing_featured_card: bg-indigo-50 border-2 border-indigo-500 shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden

animations.carousel: Use framer-motion or CSS keyframes for a continuous, smooth, un-skippable horizontal scroll for the 'Why own store' cards.
animations.hover_states: Buttons use scale-105 active:scale-95. Cards use subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow pop.
animations.page_transitions: Fade in and slide up for sections using IntersectionObserver or framer-motion.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-500 text-white hover:bg-indigo-600 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#128C7E] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold transition-all flex items-center gap-2

components.inputs: Shadcn standard but with rounded-xl, border-slate-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500.
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs but styled as a pill-switcher with rounded-full bg-slate-100 p-1

images.description: 3D Isometric mobile e-commerce storefront popping out of screen.
Woman in hijab calculating sales in an Indonesian market.
Chef at traditional Indonesian food stall.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL GOOGLE FONTS: Ensure Plus Jakarta Sans and Nunito are added to the HTML head.
HERO SECTION: Overlay the 'main_visual_mockup' image on top of the 'background_blob'. Use a side-by-side split on desktop, stacked on mobile. Ensure WhatsApp CTA is prominent.
WHY OWN STORE CAROUSEL: Must be an auto-scrolling row of 6 bento-like cards. It should not be skippable (users see the scroll animation). Use framer-motion or simple CSS marquee.
PRICING TOGGLE: Implement Monthly / Yearly / 2-Year toggle that recalculates prices shown on the cards. Highlight the 'Growth' plan.
WHATSAPP CTA: Mandatory to include WhatsApp CTA in the Hero, on every Package card, and in the Footer.
ADMIN DASHBOARD: Use a clean sidebar layout. Implement state management entirely via localStorage for this MVP. Real-time preview should immediately read from localStorage.
ADMIN AUTH: Create a simple login mask asking for Email and a 6-digit PIN (use Shadcn InputOTP).
DATA-TESTID: Append data-testid to all interactive elements, CTA buttons, inputs, tab switchers, and pricing cards (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-cta-hero').
